# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI-Assisted DSA Practice Gets a Cyberpunk Edge
- Summary: Show how CodeGrind blends DSA practice with AI guidance and an evolving cyberpunk game aesthetic, highlighting real-time editor, Azure OpenAI assistant, and new sign-in features.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-augmented-playground
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-augmented-playground

- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind merges interactive DSA challenges with AI-assisted problem solving, a real-time editor, and a cyberpunk tower-defense visualization to reinforce concepts from For loops to functions. This daily piece spotlights the learning flow, AI guidance, and a fresh cyberpunk theme without hype, grounded in our current features and recent updates.
- CTA: Try CodeGrind now and practice a problem with AI help available in-editor.
- Visual brief: A short 15–20s motion clip showing the CodeGrind editor with problem prompt on one side, AI assistant chat on the other, and a dynamic cyberpunk tower-defense visualization in the background. Include subtle UI cues like a sign-in flow, code snippets rendering, and a progress bar to imply real-time feedback.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
